title: Non-Negotiables for Traveling
html:
The packing/preparation/intent checklist Yahir runs before any major trip. Not a literal list — a recurring mental scaffold that surfaces across pre-trip notes from 2019 → 2026, sibling concept to markers of development (what to observe once there). Origin formalized as the June 2024 named note just before the China chapter — but the pattern is older.

TL;DR

  • 34 inbound citations across 25+ years of trip-prep summaries — the dominant pre-trip framework in the corpus.
  • The list itself is rarely written down in full; it surfaces as the gap between what Yahir packs and what he later wishes he'd packed.
  • Pairs with markers of development (observation framework) and the 6 month adventure creed (commitment frame).
  • The 2024-06-04 named version codified the framework right before the china chapter — that trip is the proving ground.
  • Travel to: peru · machu picchu · jordan · israel · egypt · brazil · mexico · vietnam · ha giang bike tour · chile · africa · nepal · thailand · china.

Key themes

Logistics + intent. Every trip-prep note carries both layers: what to bring AND why I'm going. Examples — 2021 08 21 pre peru packing list, 2023 07 03 packing list pre jordan, 2022 07 31 thing while in vietnam, 2024 05 13 things pre asia trip.

Reading list as packing list. Books are non-negotiable. 2023 08 14 Route from Cairo to Jordan / 2023 09 06 egypt jordan itinerary include reading material; the china chapter notes show this pattern peaking.

Solo vs accompanied is the structuring choice. 2026 03 06 emily visit itinerary / 2024 04 27 sam are the accompanied-trip notes; the solo trips (peru 2021, china 2024–25) get more preparation, not less.

Side-quests get their own list. 2025 05 20 side quests list, 2025 05 20 side quests list africa antarctica — the non-negotiables include the speculative-future trips.

Post-trip retro is part of the framework. 2023 05 13 travel trip retros, 2023 05 13 travel trip log — the list updates after every trip.

Chronological arc

  • 2019–2020 — early proto-frame (2019 09 11 research vacations on chile).
  • 2021 — peru is the first big formalization (2021 08 21 pre peru packing list, 2021 08 31 seize the day machu picchu prep, 2021 08 26 bus ride to cusco, 2021 07 29 LIMA CUSCO).
  • 2022 — vietnam (2022 07 31 thing while in vietnam) and ha giang bike tour.
  • 2023 — peak documentation around jordan / egypt / israel (2023 09 06 egypt jordan itinerary, 2023 08 14 Route from Cairo to Jordan, 2023 07 03 packing list pre jordan, 2023 09 06 egypt jordan jerusalem itinerary).
  • 2024-06-04 — named formalization (2024 06 04 non negotiables for traveling).
  • 2024–2025 — applied to china chapter; refined post-China (2025 05 20 side quests list, 2025 05 20 side quests list africa antarctica).
  • 2026 — 2026 03 06 emily visit itinerary (accompanied variant).

Source summaries

Most-impactful (10 of 30+):

  • 2024 06 04 non negotiables for traveling — named formalization
  • 2021 08 21 pre peru packing list — first formalization
  • 2023 07 03 packing list pre jordan — peak preparation density
  • 2023 09 06 egypt jordan itinerary
  • 2023 05 13 travel trip retros — retro layer
  • 2024 05 13 things pre asia trip
  • 2025 05 20 side quests list
  • 2025 05 20 side quests list africa antarctica
  • 2026 03 06 emily visit itinerary
  • 2022 07 31 thing while in vietnam

Plus ~20 additional trip-prep + post-trip summaries.

Connections

  • markers of development — sibling observation framework
  • six month adventure creed — commitment frame
  • the china chapter as comparative anthropology (synthesis) — where this got most rigorously applied
  • peru · machu picchu · jordan · israel · mexico · brazil · ha giang bike tour · africa · nepal · thailand · china — destinations
  • end of chapter reflection — the post-trip retro discipline
